_publications._publicationTitle: Pilot study of the effectiveness of a telehealth group for improving peer relationships for adolescents with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: However, the relatively low drop out from the intervention experienced amidst the COVID-19 pandemic are rather remarkable
details: Telehealth delivery format demonstrated feasibility and effectiveness for adolescents with NF1, with relatively low dropout rates during COVID-19 pandemic
